title: Poland Balls (Country Balls)
description: This mod adds a lot of country balls(poland balls).
body: This mod adds a lot of country balls, you can find naturally generated country balls in the world, and beat it, you can get wonderful items. You can revive CCCP(Soviet Union) and follow JEI's instructions to find the recipe for the summoner. This mod is in the testing phase, can not guarantee bug free. This mod is very active, I will continue to update this mod
